seo.title: Secret of Success Song Lyrics Boys

seo.keywords: Pa Vijay, Vaali, Boys, AR Rahman, Blaaze, Clinton Cerejo, Lucky Ali, Vasundhra Das, Secret of Success full lyrics, Boys songs lyrics, Secret of Success lyrics snippets, Secret of Success WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Secret of Success lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a message of ambition and the pursuit of success, encouraging listeners to strive for their dreams.

What is the plot context of the movie Boys?

Boys revolves around the lives of young men navigating love, friendship, and the challenges of adolescence.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features talented artists including Blaaze, Clinton Cerejo, Lucky Ali, and Vasundhra Das.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 28, 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Boys, the song Secret of Success Song Lyrics Boys serves as an anthem for youth, celebrating the drive to achieve one's dreams. The upbeat tempo and energetic vocals evoke feelings of motivation and excitement, making it a perfect fit for party scenes. The lyrics encourage listeners to embrace their ambitions and strive for success. Overall, the song encapsulates the vibrant spirit of youth and the importance of perseverance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Secret of Success Song Lyrics Boys is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the spirit of youth and ambition. With an incredible collaboration featuring Blaaze, Clinton Cerejo, Lucky Ali, and Vasundhra Das, this track is a vibrant celebration of dreams and determination. The genius of AR Rahman shines through, making it a must-listen for anyone seeking motivation and energy.
stanzaMeanings: Secret of Success Song Lyrics Boys
hey… hey… say sa.. sa, say ri.. ri.. say ga.. ga, say me.. say what
we think, we think, we think, we think, we think, we think, we think, that’s what we say
oh ho ho… sa ri ga me pa dha ni se we think, that’s what we say (2)
listen, luck is important, hard work is important, devotion is important, hope is important, talent is important
when everything comes together, it becomes a big success, the secret of success
sa ri ga me pa dha ni se we think, that’s what we say
this music is our own music, it has come into this world
to be a star we’ll show you how, reach for the skies and never give up…
we wake it… just take it… we wake it… just take it… oh ho ho…
hard work is the secret of success
we are the boys…(4)
little kids, talking about love and fun, singing in joy
in our teenage years, searching for happiness, we went through struggles
taking the wrong path and finding the right path, mistakes are the secret of success
we run, we understand the world, we work for her, love is the secret of success
sa ri ga me pa dha ni se we think, that’s what we say (2)
here we come, yeah, we are coming up with something and you know we are bringing it to number one
full of fun and laughter, coming a little faster, yeah, you know we are having fun.
like a monkey, holding on tight, will the situation come?
will it come with an announcement, will it come with a label, one day it will come, seize the day
sa ri ga me pa dha ni se we think, that’s what we say
this music is our own music, it has come into this world
to be a star we’ll show you how, reach for the skies and never give up…
the blade is boring, the pain is loss, even if it’s there, I will say it
there is a secret to success, there is a shortcut, honesty, honesty, honesty is the key
oh ho ho… honesty is the secret of success (4)
